description: A university climate science instructor needs visual materials demonstrating the concept of thermal inertia (the phase shift in seasonal heating between land and ocean). Your assignment is detailed in ~/Desktop/lecture_prep_request.txt. Using NASA Panoply and the NCEP Air Temperature dataset (~/PanoplyData/air.mon.ltm.nc), create 1D time-series line plots to extract peak temperature months and values for land and ocean coordinates. Export the plots, a spatial map, and a structured findings report to ~/Documents/ThermalLecture/ as specified in the request.
